# Fetcher

> A modular HTTP client ecosystem built on the native Fetch API with interceptor-powered middleware and native LLM streaming support. Published as an npm monorepo under `@ahoo-wang/*`.

## Documentation

- [Fetcher Wiki](./wiki/) — Complete documentation site
- [Wiki llms.txt](./wiki/llms.txt) — Full documentation index
- [Wiki llms-full.txt](./wiki/llms-full.txt) — All documentation content inlined

## Quick Reference

- [CLAUDE.md](./CLAUDE.md) — AI assistant project instructions
- [AGENTS.md](./AGENTS.md) — Coding agent project instructions
